options: It was late, so we went home.
Because it was late, we went home.
All are acceptable
As it was late, we went home.
questions.solution: Step 1: Check logical connector. Step 2: 'As it was late, we went home.'. Answer: As it was late, we went home..

questions.question: Join: 'She studied hard.' + 'She passed.' Best option? (Set 100)
options: She studied hard but she passed.
She studied hard, yet she passed.
She studied hard, for she passed.
She studied hard, so she passed.
questions.solution: Step 1: Check logical connector. Step 2: 'She studied hard, so she passed.'. Answer: She studied hard, so she passed..
